experiment: N2-LBSA: ResNet34-U-Net + Lesion-Boundary Saliency Attention with AugLite, 200 epochs, constant lr
note: N2 adds a Lesion-Boundary Saliency Attention block after the SMP U-Net decoder and before the segmentation head. Other training settings are kept identical to the plain AugLite E200 ConstLR baseline.
